title: PinYin Language
description: Added Pin Yin language, may help you learn Chinese?
body:
### en_us
Added PinYin language for Minecraft. You can now play Minecraft in the PinYin language!

PinYin language can help you learn the pronunciation of Chinese, but it does not help you learn the semantics of Chinese.

### zh_cn
为 Minecraft 添加了拼音语言。你现在可以用拼音来玩 Minecraft！

拼音可以帮助你学习汉语的发音，但并不能帮助你学习汉语的语义。

### py_cn
Wèi Minecraft Tiān Jiā Le Pīn Yīn Yǔ Yán。Nǐ Xiàn Zài Kě Yǐ Yòng Pīn Yīn Lái Wán Minecraft！

Pīn Yīn Kě Yǐ Bāng Zhù Nǐ Xué Xí Hàn Yǔ De Fā Yīn，Dàn Bìng Bù Néng Bāng Zhù Nǐ Xué Xí Hàn Yǔ De Yǔ Yì。
